title: FreshGrass
description: Fresh, bright grass for a more vibrant Minecraft world — simple, clean, beautiful.
body:
![Titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58ac40f892ee213ef5ce65f9bf0b70536f1c4bb5.png)

---

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e5d47afb1ec97eaf67b51e3922abe80f00bf06.png)](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85767d619d6e19ce7285fa1798c07c196575a0ea_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/victorwinner/projects)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c39355dab93d38f00808074166bd07c6a1dad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VictorWinner)

---

See nature brighter, play happier.

Juicy Grass is a lightweight texture pack designed to enhance the natural beauty of your world. It brightens and refreshes grass textures, giving landscapes a lively, lush, and vibrant look without changing the core style of the game.

---

**📷 Media**

![ff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mtDlQsqV/images/164214afea3c3d61e12ce8122391fa1bb97c84b2.png)

---


<details>
<summary>🧱 What's Included?</summary>

A refreshed grass texture that brings a vibrant, juicy, and bright-green look to your world. This pack enhances the natural feel of landscapes, making fields, hills, and forests look more alive and inviting—perfect if you want your game to feel more colorful and full of energy.

</details>

<details>
<summary>🎯 Who is this for?</summary>

This texture pack is ideal for players who love a clean, lively, and fresh aesthetic. If you enjoy bright environments, rich greenery, and a more cheerful atmosphere, this pack is made for you.

</details>



<details>
<summary>💡 Note</summary>

This pack focuses solely on grass visuals, keeping the rest of the world untouched for a smooth vanilla-friendly experience. Works great alongside other visual mods and shaders.

</details>

---
